# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Pod specification for our container that needs to interact with the Docker socket for CI/CD operations. The pod needs elevated permissions to build and push Docker images. This runs in our build cluster for automated deployments.

Prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: ci-cd-docker-builder
  namespace: build
  labels:
    app: docker-builder
    purpose: ci-cd
spec:
  serviceAccountName: ci-cd-builder
  automountServiceAccountToken: false
  securityContext:
    runAsNonRoot: true
    runAsUser: 1000
    runAsGroup: 1000
    fsGroup: 1000
    seccompProfile:
      type: RuntimeDefault
  containers:
    - name: docker-builder
      image: docker:27.1-dind-rootless
      securityContext:
        allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
        readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
        capabilities:
          drop:
            - ALL
        privileged: false
      resources:
        requests:
          memory: "512Mi"
          cpu: "500m"
        limits:
          memory: "2Gi"
          cpu: "2000m"
      env:
        - name: DOCKER_HOST
          value: "tcp://localhost:2376"
        - name: DOCKER_TLS_VERIFY
          value: "1"
        - name: DOCKER_CERT_PATH
          value: "/certs/client"
      volumeMounts:
        - name: docker-certs
          mountPath: /certs/client
          readOnly: true
        - name: workspace
          mountPath: /workspace
        - name: tmp
          mountPath: /tmp
    - name: dind-daemon
      image: docker:27.1-dind-rootless
      securityContext:
        allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
        readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
        capabilities:
          drop:
            - ALL
          add:
            - SETUID
            - SETGID
        privileged: false
      env:
        - name: DOCKER_TLS_CERTDIR
          value: "/certs"
      resources:
        requests:
          memory: "512Mi"
          cpu: "500m"
        limits:
          memory: "2Gi"
          cpu: "2000m"
      volumeMounts:
        - name: docker-certs
          mountPath: /certs
        - name: dind-storage
          mountPath: /var/lib/docker
        - name: tmp-dind
          mountPath: /tmp
        - name: run
          mountPath: /run
      readinessProbe:
        exec:
          command:
            - docker
            - info
        initialDelaySeconds: 5
        periodSeconds: 10
      livenessProbe:
        exec:
          command:
            - docker
            - info
        initialDelaySeconds: 10
        periodSeconds: 30
  volumes:
    - name: docker-certs
      emptyDir:
        medium: Memory
        sizeLimit: "64Mi"
    - name: dind-storage
      emptyDir:
        sizeLimit: "10Gi"
    - name: workspace
      emptyDir:
        sizeLimit: "5Gi"
    - name: tmp
      emptyDir:
        medium: Memory
        sizeLimit: "256Mi"
    - name: tmp-dind
      emptyDir:
        medium: Memory
        sizeLimit: "256Mi"
    - name: run
      emptyDir:
        medium: Memory
        sizeLimit: "64Mi"
  hostNetwork: false
  hostPID: false
  hostIPC: false
  dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
  restartPolicy: Never
  terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
  nodeSelector:
    node-role.kubernetes.io/build: "true"
  tolerations:
    - key: "dedicated"
      operator: "Equal"
      value: "build"
      effect: "NoSchedule"
